caption: A man with short grey hair and glasses, wearing a dark suit, white shirt, and purple tie, is speaking in a modern indoor setting with glass walls. He wears a small headset microphone. On-screen graphics at the bottom display the text "MONGODB WORLD 2022" alongside hashtags "#MDW22 | #theCUBE" and the label "theCUBE From the Javits Center, New York, NY". A "Sponsored By MongoDB" logo appears in the bottom right. In one sequence, the text changes to identify the speaker as "DAVE VELLANTE Co-Founder & Co-CEO, SiliconANGLE Media, Inc. | @dvellante". Throughout the clip, the man is captured from the chest up, gesturing with his hands and changing his facial expressions as he speaks. The background remains a consistent, neutral-toned office or conference environment.
